label: Gantt chart
description: One bar per item positioned by its start/end dates on a shared time axis, with optional progress.

params.label: Items
params.description: { label, start, end, progress? } per bar.

params.label: Height
params.description: Pixel height, or a percent string for responsive containers.

params.label: Palette
params.description: Ordered hex colours; series/slices take them in turn.
